mission.title: surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction
mission.description: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction . Requested by 55+ users.

steps.title: Check current surrealdb setup
steps.description:
Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:
```bash
surreal version
```
This feature requires a working surrealdb installation.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

The Rust SDK transaction statements are not documented at

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request. We really appreciate you spending the time to work on SurrealDB. 🚀 🎉 

## What is the motivation?

When I started using SurrealDB with Rust, I noticed that there was no way to create multiple statements in a single transaction (see: https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/issues/2733).

I really needed this feature as it's much more clean and ergonomic than to manually start writing queries in a single transaction.

**Note**: This is a living draft

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction " is functioning correctly.
